themes.label: Covenant

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The earth's opening to swallow the rebels (16:31-33) was supernatural judgment, not natural d...".
